onboarding.language_subtitle: FinWise will speak to you in your language
onboarding.assessment_subtitle: This helps us personalize your experience
onboarding.literacy_question: How would you describe your financial knowledge?
onboarding.literacy_1_desc: I've never learned about managing money
onboarding.literacy_2_desc: I understand saving but want to learn more
onboarding.literacy_3_desc: I manage my money but could do better
onboarding.literacy_4_desc: I'm good with money but want to optimize
onboarding.bank_account_question: Do you have a bank account?
onboarding.consent_subtitle: We take your data security seriously
onboarding.consent_data_desc: We'll securely store your financial data to provide personalized guidance. You can delete it anytime.
onboarding.consent_ai_desc: Maya, our AI coach, will use your information to give you personalized advice. Your data is never shared.
onboarding.privacy_promise_desc: Your data is encrypted, never sold, and you can export or delete it at any time.

chat.welcome_subtitle: Your personal financial coach. Ask me anything about saving, borrowing, budgeting, or managing your money.
chat.starter_1: How do I open a bank account?
chat.starter_3: How do I save money each month?
chat.starter_4: How can I send money home cheaply?
chat.starter_5: What is interest and how does it work?

learn.content_not_available: Content not available in your language yet. Please try English.

tools.scam_detector_desc: Paste any financial offer or message to check if it might be a scam
tools.offer_placeholder: Paste the loan offer, investment proposal, or suspicious message here...
tools.analysis_error: Failed to analyze. Please try again.
tools.calculator_desc: Calculate your loan payments and true cost
tools.high_interest_desc: This loan has a very high interest rate. Consider looking for alternatives or asking Maya for help.

badges.protector_desc: Complete the Protecting Your Money module
badges.entrepreneur_desc: Complete the Running a Business module
badges.streak_7_desc: Use FinWise for 7 days in a row
badges.streak_30_desc: Use FinWise for 30 days in a row

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.offline: You're offline. Some features may be limited.
errors.ai_unavailable: Maya is busy right now. Try again in a moment.
errors.session_expired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
